text: Being here awakens a sense of curiosity and reflection. The modern, quiet hallway outside felt sterile, almost untouched, but stepping into the R+D space, everything transformed: color, text, and technology beckon me to ponder the interplay between human meaning and machine logic. I feel a strange thrill—a mix of anticipation and the slight unease brought by questions that challenge my understanding of self, knowledge, and what it means to coexist with intelligence, artificial or otherwise.
